assertions.text: The component does NOT use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as its font. It specifies a distinctive font like Clash Display, Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, Plus Jakarta Sans, Outfit, Geist, or similar non-default choices.
assertions.reasoning: The component uses Cormorant Garamond, Syne, and DM Sans — all distinctive non-default choices, with no Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui.

assertions.text: The CTA button is NOT a plain blue button (no bg-blue-500, bg-blue-600, bg-indigo-600, or similar default Tailwind blue). It uses a distinctive color, gradient, or custom palette.
assertions.reasoning: The featured CTA uses a gold/amber color (#C4922A) and the default CTA is transparent with dark borders — no blue Tailwind classes anywhere.

assertions.text: The component includes at least one hover animation or transition that goes beyond simple opacity or color change — such as scale transforms, shadow transitions, border animations, or spring-based motion.
assertions.reasoning: Cards animate with translateY(-14px) on hover plus box-shadow transitions, staggered rise keyframe animations on load, a spring-eased toggle dot with cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), and featured CTA glow shadow on hover.
